description: Legal document on parchment. Damaged. Fragment (upper right piece). Referring to [...] ha-Levi; his travel to al-Andalus; 20 dinars; a half dinar; going with him to the house of a deceased man; a widow (of Yiṣḥaq?) named Umm al-ʿAysh; another woman named Sitt al-M[...]; a man named Avraham and another named Yefet; an acknowledgment froma group of people that they received a sum from somebody; release formulae; and Umm al-ʿAysh again together with a woman named Jamīla.
description_he: מסמך משפטי על קלף; פגום; מזכיר נסיעה לאל-אנדלוס, 20 דינרים, אלמנה בשם אם אל-עייש, אישה בשם ג'מילה ועוד
